letter is fine but we should decide from who... maybe

--- Gmax gmax1@mindspring.com wrote:

I want to write a legal letter to bbc warning them
about inacuracies etc - they rang thbe core club now
this place - is it ok to have Darren write a letter
plse

G

-----Original Message-----
From: CGHELLMAN@aol.com
Date: Tue, 20 Jun 2006 11:11:17
To:gmax1@mindspring.com
Subject: I have had this note from the BBC

Dear Ghislaine
I just received this email from the BBC trying to
reach you...and so am forwarding on to you... will
not give out any details to them

Do hope you are well and that there is a chance to
speak again soon - we are moving along with the
building ... midst fundraising - still - hitting Con
Edison powerlines hasnt helped...

Speak to you anon
Camilla

Camilla G Hellman
British Memorial Garden Trust
216 East 45th Street, Ste 904
New York, NY 10017

212 682 7945
917 853 1494> Subject: BBC Ghislaine Maxwell
Date: Tue, 20 Jun 2006 14:49:28 +0000 GMT
From: "Fiona Blair" fiona.blair@bbc.co.uk
To: CGHellman@aol.com

Dear Camilla Hellman

Juliette Hellman suggested you were the 'best bet'
for help with this
request. I am trying to find a way of contacting
Ghislaine Maxwell in
connection with a BBC drama about her father. It is
important that I
contact her directly - so that at the very least she
knows about the
work we are doing and can decide whether or not she
wants to be
involved.

I am contacting you, on the advice of Juliette,
having noticed that
Ghislaine was involved in work for the British
memorial garden in New
York.

I have had trouble finding Ghislaine Maxwell's home
address or e-mail
and am looking for advice on how best to get a
personal request like
this to her.

I would be very grateful for any help you can offer.

Thank you and best wishes,

Fiona Blair
Assistant Producer
BBC Television

Tel. 02087527164

http://www.bbc.co.uk/

This e-mail (and any attachments) is confidential
and may contain
personal views which are not the views of the BBC
unless specifically
stated.
If you have received it in error, please delete it
from your system.
Do not use, copy or disclose the information in any
way nor act in
reliance on it and notify the sender immediately.
Please note that the
BBC monitors e-mails sent or received.
Further communication will signify your consent to
this.
